nation: Conseil des Innus de Pakua Shipu
one_time_description: Restatement: equity investment in enterprise (Société en commandite APUIAT) was understated in prior years; increased by $2,057,675 for year ended March 31, 2022
economic_notes: Council holds interests in: Société en commandite APUIAT (12.48%), 9321-1654 Québec inc. (12.48%), Voyage Inter-Nation & Associés inc. (33%), 2962-6462 Québec inc. (100%), 9152-0759 Québec inc. (50%), Pêcherie Shipek S.E.C. (50% - snow crab fishing in zone 16). Council provided joint and several guarantees of $2,750,000 for Pêcherie Shipek S.E.C. boat and fishing permits.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED (opinion avec réserves) for three reasons: (1) non-compliance with SP 3280 asset retirement obligations - not identified or measured; (2) scope limitation on a significant component accounted for by modified equity method (auditors unable to audit); (3) no inventory count performed at March 31, 2023 or 2022. Financial statements are NON-CONSOLIDATED. Two prior-year restatements: equity investment understated by $2,057,675 and operating fund adjusted by $1,099,641 due to ISC review committee letter. Fiscal year is 2023 (March 31, 2023) but document was signed January 17, 2025 - very late filing. Revenue and expense totals reconstructed: total revenue = operating fund revenue 17,138,565 + capital transfer revenue 4,818,128 = 21,956,693; total expenses = operating fund expenses 17,690,101 + amortization 1,814,656 = 19,504,757; surplus includes equity pickup of 5,036,948 from enterprises. ISC funding and government transfer breakdowns not separately totalled in extracted text. Remuneration schedules referenced (pages 194, 196) but not included in extracted text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
